hooks.prompt:
Run a design review before this git push. Read the diff with `git diff main...HEAD` (or `git diff HEAD~1 HEAD` if on main). Check the changes against the Jaunt project rules defined in CLAUDE.md and README.md on these 4 axes:
1. Modèle de données — types from src/types/supabase.ts, no invented client-side fields
2. Architecture — business logic in composables, state in Pinia, one component per route in src/views/
3. CLAUDE.md rules — no `any`, no `console.log`, loading/empty/error states on async data
4. Sécurité — no secrets exposed, sensitive logic in Edge Functions not client-side

If you find blocking issues (❌), output JSON: {"continue": false, "stopReason": "Design review failed: <list the issues>"}
If only warnings (⚠️) or all clear (✅), output JSON: {"continue": true, "systemMessage": "Design review passed. <summary>"}
Keep the summary under 3 lines.
